creator: parv_@yahoo.com
text:
default make package fails for editors/vim-lite w/ this message

===>  Building package for vim-6.0.38
Creating package /source/ports/editors/vim-lite/vim-6.0.38.tgz
Registering depends:.
Creating gzip'd tar ball in '/source/ports/editors/vim-lite/vim-6.0.38.tgz'
tar: can't add file bin/gvimdiff : No such file or directory
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /source/ports/editors/vim-lite.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: 	
cd /usr/ports/editors/vim-lite && make package
